raw_response_text:
```xml
<tbox>
    <!-- Class 34 (Spiny blue thistle-like flower) -->
    [Class_34] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([spiky_blue_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([central_spiky_cone]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([dark_center]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([green_stem_with_spines]).

    <!-- Class 81 (Clematis) -->
    [Class_81] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([large_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([prominent_stamen]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([pink_or_purple_color]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([delicate_flower_structure]).

    <!-- Class 88 (Nasturtium) -->
    [Class_88] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([bright_orange_or_red_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([yellow_center]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([rounded_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([slightly_textured_surface]).

    <!-- Class 71 (Azalea/Rhododendron) -->
    [Class_71] sqsubseteq hasVisualFeature([soft_pink_or_purple_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([smooth_petals]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([clustered_flowers]) and
                      hasVisualFeature([green_leaves_in_background]).
</tbox>

<abox>
    <!-- Target Image Observations -->
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [spiky_blue_petals]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [central_spiky_cone]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [dark_center]).
    hasVisualFeature(Target, [green_stem_with_spines]).
</abox>

<dl_explanation>
    The Target Image exhibits the following visual features:
    - Spiky blue petals
    - A central spiky cone
    - A dark center
    - A green stem with spines

    These features directly match the necessary and sufficient conditions for [Class_34] as defined in the TBox. The presence of spiky blue petals and a central spiky cone, along with the dark center and spiny stem, aligns with the discriminative visual patterns observed in the labeled examples for Class 34. No other class matches all these features simultaneously.
</dl_explanation>

<response>34</response>
```
